summary: Tested bottom navigation transparency updates and Facebook Share Overlay enhancements. All features working correctly: 60% opacity on bottom nav, More menu, and desktop sidebar. Nav correctly shows only for logged-in users on Marketplace and ListingDetail pages. Fixed a bug in BottomNav.jsx where AuthContext destructuring failed when used outside ProtectedRoute.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed BottomNav.jsx: Changed 'const { user } = useContext(AuthContext)' to 'const authContext = useContext(AuthContext); const user = authContext?.user;' to handle null context when used outside ProtectedRoute

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All transparency and nav visibility features working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation transparency updates fully tested. All features working: bg-gray-900/60 on bottom nav and desktop sidebar, bg-gray-900/70 on More menu popup, border-white/10 on all nav elements. Nav correctly hidden for guests on Marketplace and ListingDetail pages.

nav_visibility_marketplace.logged_in_user: PASS - Nav visible for logged-in users

nav_visibility_listing_detail.logged_in_user: PASS - Nav visible for logged-in users

facebook_share_overlay.subtitle: VERIFIED - 'Share Your Latest Minted Photos' (code review)
facebook_share_overlay.photo_sorting: VERIFIED - sorted by created_at descending (code review)
facebook_share_overlay.go_to_group_button: VERIFIED - uses window.location.href for same tab (code review)

bug_fixed.issue: Cannot destructure property 'user' of AuthContext as it is null
bug_fixed.cause: BottomNav used 'const { user } = useContext(AuthContext)' which fails when AuthContext is null (outside ProtectedRoute)
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to 'const authContext = useContext(AuthContext); const user = authContext?.user;' for null-safe access
